calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Continued To May-15-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephanie A. Buori, Esq., Gordon & Reese LLP, Telephone 415-9865900, appearing for Defendant Photoworks, Inc. et al;
No other appearances

This matter was heard by Judge Harold E. Kahn at 9:00 a.m.

*Fletcher Brown, Esq., Counsel for Plaintiff was not present in court at the time this matter was called. The case was passed to allow sufficient time for Mr. Brown to appear. At the time of the recalling of the matter, counsel was still not present in court*

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PHOTOWORKS, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. Counsel for defendant is to prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge:Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HEK)

*After hearing and opposing counsel had left Mr. Fletcher appears in court and is informed of the ruling on the motion*

Notice Of Motion For An Order To Correct Filing Date
Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Stephanie A. Buori, Esq., Gordon & Reese LLP, Telephone 415-9865900, appearing for Defendant Photoworks, Inc. et al;
No other appearances

This matter was heard by Judge Harold E. Kahn at 9:00 a.m.

*Fletcher Brown, Esq., Counsel for Plaintiff was not present in court at the time this matter was called. The case was passed to allow sufficient time for Mr. Brown to appear. At the time of the recalling of the matter, counsel was still not present in court*

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KARL REEVES Notice Of Motion For An Order To Correct Filing Date is DENIED. Counsel for defendant is to prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HEK)

*After hearing has completed and opposing counsel had left Mr. Fletcher appears in court and is informed of the ruling on the motion*

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Continued To Feb-21-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Fletcher Brown, Esq. 510-986-0441 for Plaintiff.
Stephanie Ulman, Esq. 415-986-5900 for Defendant Photoworks.

RULING - A R G U E D. Parties discuss clerk's rejection of papers since there was no civil cover sheet. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PHOTOWORKS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling. Continued to 2/21/19. Plaintiff's other motion which may require a nunc pro tunc order and further evidence will also be heard on 2/21/19. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
